name: C3 continuous burst — buffer fill/drain test | 240mm f/5.6 ISO 100 SS 1/8000
notes: Purpose: measure how many RAW frames the A7R IVa buffer holds at cont-hi-plus
and how long the card needs to drain after the burst ends.
The shutter is pressed at C3-10s and held for 112s (until C3+102s).
The sequence reports TIMEOUT (expected — count=5000 is never reached);
the log line 'Shoot: TIMEOUT captures=NNN/5000' gives the actual frame count.
After sequence ends, poll buffer drain manually:
Expected figures (compressed RAW ~30 MB, UHS-II ~130 MB/s write):
Buffer fill  : ~68 frames in ~7 s at 10 fps
Write-limited: ~4 fps for remaining ~103 s  →  ~412 additional frames
Drain time   : ~480 × 30 MB / 130 MB/s  ≈  110 s after burst release

steps._section: === Hold shutter from C3-10s to C3+102s (112s window) ===
steps.label: C3-burst
